  "reasoning": "The new federal government was weak, with limited administrative reach and contested authority (e.g., the Whiskey Rebellion), but a major step up from the Articles of Confederation. Civil society was vibrant, with a partisan press and new political clubs emerging from revolutionary fervor to actively debate and challenge the new state.",
